'''zhodhachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labellable|labellable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labellable|labellable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhodhachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhachithi|zhodhachithi]] || [[word:zhodhachiji|zhodhachiji]] || [[word:zhodhachishi|zhodhachishi]] || [[word:zhodhachiki|zhodhachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhachuthuthu|zhodhachuthuthu]] || [[word:zhodhachujuju|zhodhachujuju]] || [[word:zhodhachushushu|zhodhachushushu]] || [[word:zhodhachukuku|zhodhachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhachuthu|zhodhachuthu]] || [[word:zhodhachuju|zhodhachuju]] || [[word:zhodhachushu|zhodhachushu]] || [[word:zhodhachuku|zhodhachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhachufthuf|zhodhachufthuf]] || [[word:zhodhachufjuf|zhodhachufjuf]] || [[word:zhodhachufshuf|zhodhachufshuf]] || [[word:zhodhachufkuf|zhodhachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhachethe|zhodhachethe]] || [[word:zhodhacheje|zhodhacheje]] || [[word:zhodhacheshe|zhodhacheshe]] || [[word:zhodhacheke|zhodhacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhachothotho|zhodhachothotho]] || [[word:zhodhachojojo|zhodhachojojo]] || [[word:zhodhachoshosho|zhodhachoshosho]] || [[word:zhodhachokoko|zhodhachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhachotho|zhodhachotho]] || [[word:zhodhachojo|zhodhachojo]] || [[word:zhodhachosho|zhodhachosho]] || [[word:zhodhachoko|zhodhachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhachofthof|zhodhachofthof]] || [[word:zhodhachofjof|zhodhachofjof]] || [[word:zhodhachofshof|zhodhachofshof]] || [[word:zhodhachofkof|zhodhachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŠthĂŠ|zhodhachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŠjĂŠ|zhodhachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŠshĂŠ|zhodhachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodhachĂŠkĂŠ|zhodhachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhachathatha|zhodhachathatha]] || [[word:zhodhachajaja|zhodhachajaja]] || [[word:zhodhachashasha|zhodhachashasha]] || [[word:zhodhachakaka|zhodhachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhachatha|zhodhachatha]] || [[word:zhodhachaja|zhodhachaja]] || [[word:zhodhachasha|zhodhachasha]] || [[word:zhodhachaka|zhodhachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhachafthaf|zhodhachafthaf]] || [[word:zhodhachafjaf|zhodhachafjaf]] || [[word:zhodhachafshaf|zhodhachafshaf]] || [[word:zhodhachafkaf|zhodhachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhodhachasha|zhodhachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodhachshĂ«sha|zhodhachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodhachrosha|zhodhachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodhachmusha|zhodhachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodhachyasha|zhodhachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodhachnkshĂ«sha|gozhodhachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodhachnkrosha|gozhodhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodhachnkmusha|gozhodhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodhachnkyasha|gozhodhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhodhadhachasha|zhodhadhachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodhadhachshĂ«sha|zhodhadhachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodhadhachrosha|zhodhadhachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodhadhachmusha|zhodhadhachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodhadhachyasha|zhodhadhachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodhadhachnkshĂ«sha|gozhodhadhachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodhadhachnkrosha|gozhodhadhachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodhadhachnkmusha|gozhodhadhachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodhadhachnkyasha|gozhodhadhachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhedhĂŠchasha|zhedhĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠchshĂ«sha|zhedhĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠchrosha|zhedhĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠchmusha|zhedhĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠchyasha|zhedhĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gozhedhĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠchnkrosha|gozhedhĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠchnkmusha|gozhedhĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠchnkyasha|gozhedhĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhodhfachasha|zhodhfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodhfachshĂ«sha|zhodhfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodhfachrosha|zhodhfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodhfachmusha|zhodhfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodhfachyasha|zhodhfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodhfachnkshĂ«sha|gozhodhfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodhfachnkrosha|gozhodhfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodhfachnkmusha|gozhodhfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodhfachnkyasha|gozhodhfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
